subcodes.first_line: O descendant of Abraham, Friend of God! Concerning the charitable association of which thou didst write, it is truly most pleasing and desirable [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیل حضرت خلیل در خصوص شرکت خیریه اساسی که نگاشتی مرغوب و مطلوب فی الحقیقه
subcodes.subjects: @charitable associations; humanitarian activities, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @consultation, @importance of community building
